mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM USERS WHERE USER_NO = #{ownerUserNo} AND ROLE = 'OWNER'
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_STORE.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO STORES ( STORE_ID, STORE_CODE, STORE_NAME, PHONE, ADDRESS, OWNER_USER_NO, STATUS, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{storeId}, 'S' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY') || LPAD(#{storeId}, 4, '0'), #{storeName}, #{phone}, #{address}, #{ownerUserNo}, 'OPEN', SYSDATE )
mapper.select:
SELECT STORE_ID AS storeId,
'S' || TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'YYYY') || LPAD(STORE_ID, 4, '0') AS storeCode,
STORE_NAME AS storeName, PHONE AS phone, ADDRESS AS address, STATUS AS status, CREATED_AT AS createdAt FROM STORES WHERE 1 = 1
AND STATUS = #{status}
AND ( STORE_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR STORE_CODE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR PHONE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR ADDRESS LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
ORDER BY STORE_ID ASC
ORDER BY STORE_NAME ASC
ORDER BY STATUS ASC, STORE_ID DESC
ORDER BY STORE_ID DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STORES WHERE 1 = 1
AND STATUS = #{status}
AND TRUNC(CREATED_AT) >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND TRUNC(CREATED_AT) <= TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND ( STORE_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR STORE_CODE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR PHONE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR ADDRESS LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )

SELECT S.STORE_ID AS storeId,
'S' || TO_CHAR(S.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY') || LPAD(S.STORE_ID, 4, '0') AS storeCode,
S.STORE_NAME AS storeName, S.PHONE AS phone, S.ADDRESS AS address, S.STATUS AS status, S.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, S.OWNER_USER_NO AS ownerUserNo,
NVL(U.USER_NAME, '-') AS ownerName
FROM STORES S LEFT JOIN USERS U ON S.OWNER_USER_NO = U.USER_NO
WHERE S.STORE_ID = #{_parameter}
mapper.update: UPDATE STORES SET STORE_NAME = #{storeName}, PHONE = #{phone}, ADDRESS = #{address}, STATUS = #{status} WHERE STORE_ID = #{storeId}
mapper.select: SELECT STORE_ID AS storeId, STORE_CODE AS storeCode, STORE_NAME AS storeName, PHONE AS phone, ADDRESS AS address, STATUS AS status, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, OWNER_USER_NO AS ownerUserNo FROM STORES WHERE OWNER_USER_NO = #{_parameter}
SELECT USER_NO AS "ownerUserNo", USER_ID AS "ownerLoginId", USER_NAME AS "ownerName" FROM USERS WHERE USER_ID = #{keyword} AND ROLE = 'OWNER'
